allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./game/data.js'\); const {Game}=require\('./game/engine.js'\); console.log\('OK jobs:', Object.keys\(d.JOBS\).length, '| monsters:', Object.keys\(d.MONSTERS\).length, '| items:', Object.keys\(d.ITEMS\).length\); const g=new Game\(console.log\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./game/data.js'\); const {Game} = require\('./game/engine.js'\); console.log\('TRAIN_SKILLS:', d.TRAIN_SKILLS.length\); console.log\('PETS/MERCS:', Object.keys\(d.PETS\).length, '/', Object.keys\(d.MERCENARIES\).length\); const g = new Game\(\(\)=>{}\); console.log\('엔진 OK'\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./game/data.js'\); console.log\('monsters:', Object.keys\(d.MONSTERS\).length\); console.log\('locations:', Object.keys\(d.LOCATIONS\).length\); console.log\('pendragon_peak exists:', !!d.LOCATIONS.pendragon_peak\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./game/data.js'\); const {Game}=require\('./game/engine.js'\); console.log\('몬스터:', Object.keys\(d.MONSTERS\).length\); console.log\('수련장 특성:'\); Object.entries\(d.TRAINING_HALLS\).forEach\(\([k,h]\)=>console.log\('  '+h.name.padEnd\(18\)+' x'+h.mul+' — '+h.trait\)\); const g=new Game\(\(\)=>{}\); console.log\('엔진 OK'\);")
